query:
SELECT id, salesPerson, customerName, deliveryCity, course, teacher, classDate, classTime, notes, createdAt
FROM orders
WHERE salesPerson IN ('土豆', '山竹') 
  AND classDate >= '2026-01-12'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
